programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Danny and Nia continue to struggle with their newborn daughter refusing a bottle; as Kristen grapples with postpartum blues, her relationship with Luke is tested when their first date night out without Kaia turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: KJ and Dara make a surprising announcement; Mia is forced to confront some hard truths about her relationship; West apologizes for his actions, which leads to a long overdue conversation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: The emo themes are on point as the Republic crew debates wigs, aesthetics and what emo even means; between jokes and glam, lingering drama with the girls leaves emotions running high.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: After their explosive fight, Kelsey and Liz are forced to confront issues in their friendship; Alicia's aunts have a few wise words for Rulla regarding her marriage; the ladies go on a railroad excursion that ends with another friendship possibly being derailed.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.sub-title: Alicia Carmody, Rosie Dimare, Ashley Iaconetti, Liz McGraw, Rulla Nehme Pontarelli, Kelsey Swanson and Jo-Ellen Tiberi
programme.desc: Andy Cohen interviews Alicia Carmody, Rosie Dimare, Ashley Iaconetti, Liz McGraw, Rulla Nehme Pontarelli, Kelsey Swanson and Jo-Ellen Tiberi.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Host Andy Cohen welcomes guests from some of television's most popular series, as well as other entertainment stars, to chat about pop culture and celebrities in the news.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kellyoke encore: "When My Fingers Find Your Strings"; Elizabeth Banks; "What's Creepin' Up On Me?"; Billy Magnussen; donkey rescue; "Way Day" demo; Inner Child Theater Camp.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: If I Steal, I Take It All; DNA: Interactions Have Consequences
programme.desc: Tammy suspects that her cousin Rhonda stole money from her on the way back from a funeral; Monica doesn't want her child to grow up with the pain of not knowing who her father is.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The ladies try to tap into the healing energy of Sedona, but Kyle and Dorit's friendship remains on the rocks; Bozoma and Rachel struggle with the desert heat while the others embrace the elements on a hike to the vortex.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Rachel hosts a psychic soirée for the group and revelations come when Sutton presses Jennifer Tilly about her comments made to Kyle in Sedona; Boz travels to Nevada in hopes of continuing her fertility journey; Dorit confronts Amanda about her remarks on her marriage, but emotions run high when Amanda discloses it's the anniversary of an unimaginable loss; Rachel's friend Natalie Swanston Fuller joins the group.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Rachel hosts a dinner party featuring a clairvoyant's seance, which emotionally affects Amanda, prompting her to seek Kyle's support; Dorrit believes she does nothing wrong.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The tension continues at Dorit and Erika's birthday dinner as Kyle is pulled into the middle of Amanda and Dorit's drama. Rachel's tough exterior finally cracks. Sutton is put in the hot seat when Dorit calls her out for not having her back. Boz receives a heartbreaking update on her fertility journey.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Dorit sits down with Mauricio in hopes of breaking through to PK; Sutton gets emotional while opening up to her daughter about her name change.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.sub-title: The Cult's Out of the Bag
programme.desc: Rachel finally gets her wish with a Hot Girl Summer at a Hamptons club. Kyle and Dorit put their problems aside to enjoy the vibe. Boz and Sutton want to get to know the real Amanda, who finally sheds light on a tough time in her past. Erika and Sutton dine with Denise, who opens up about her volatile divorce. Erika stuns the table with a revelation of her own.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Sutton and Jennifer Tilly weigh in on a new, but all-too-familiar woman from Sutton's past; Erika revisits a painful chapter of her life; Boz and Lael travel down to San Diego to visit Keely.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: After smooth sailing in the Hamptons, tensions rise when Dorit discovers Kyle has been talking behind her back; Rachel sits her boys down to discuss her divorce; Amanda throws herself into planning her extravagant wedding; Boz invites the girls to join her on a trip to Italy at a bellissimo Tuscan villa where Sutton learns that no good deed goes unpunished.

programme.desc: Bozoma pulls out all the stops for the first night in Italy, including a surprise operatic performance; Erika questions Sutton's motive for choosing Amanda as her roommate; Amanda's attempt to smooth things over with Dorit leads to frustration from Kyle and Sutton; Rachel receives a troubling text from home.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: London's summer season kicks off at a glamourous garden party hosted by Mark-Francis, where rumors begin to swirl.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.sub-title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Lottie and Joshua celebrate her pregnancy with a photoshoot as Myka juggles the challenges of solo parenting.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Martha digs through long-forgotten boxes from her past, unearthing memories; Myka sits down with Dara; Missè organizes a day of wine tasting and bonding.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Lottie and Joshua shop for the perfect push present; as a health scare rattles her, Emma turns to Mark-Francis for comfort and reassurance; Kimi hosts a glamorous art party, but the celebration takes a sharp turn when she's confronted about her behavior.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Myka embarks on a new business built on kindness; Lottie and Joshua host a gender reveal for their families; Margo and Emma throw competing dinner parties where Mark-Francis spreads a rumor about Margo, leaving Martha caught between her two best friends.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Health news lands and a fancy picnic turns tense when Margo calls out Mark-Francis.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: "Ladies of London" is back with a new wave of British blue bloods, ambitious American expats and glamorous international socialites.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: The ladies trade the bustle of London for a lavish retreat at the magnificent Longleat House, anticipating a weekend of elegance, adventure and indulgence; the calm of the countryside soon begins to fray, however, as long-simmering tensions between Margo and Mark-Francis resurface, threatening to turn their refined escape into an uncomfortable clash.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: Follows a wave of British blue bloods, American expats and international socialites who light up London's social scene.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: Gracie Hart (Sandra Bullock) was never thrilled to have to go undercover as a competitor in a beauty pageant. Now Gracie, who works for the FBI, is dealing with some very public attention thanks to her waltz down the runway. Her overnight celebrity does not impress her new partner, Sam Fuller (Regina King). But the pair has to put aside their differences when one of Gracie's former beauty queen pals, Cheryl Frasier (Heather Burns), turns up missing, and the FBI is put on the case.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: When a terrorist threatens to bomb the Miss United States pageant, the FBI rushes to find a female agent to go undercover as a contestant. Unfortunately, Gracie is the only female FBI agent who can "look the part" despite her complete lack of refinement and femininity. She prides herself in being "just one of the boys" and is horrified at the idea of becoming a girly girl.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

Unfortunately, Gracie is the only female FBI agent who can "look the part" despite her complete lack of refinement and femininity. She prides herself in being "just one of the boys" and is horrified at the idea of becoming a girly girl.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: Gracie Hart (Sandra Bullock) was never thrilled to have to go undercover as a competitor in a beauty pageant. Now Gracie, who works for the FBI, is dealing with some very public attention thanks to her waltz down the runway. Her overnight celebrity does not impress her new partner, Sam Fuller (Regina King). But the pair has to put aside their differences when one of Gracie's former beauty queen pals, Cheryl Frasier (Heather Burns), turns up missing, and the FBI is put on the case.
